entry.title: Kiss All The Time. Drunk, Occasionally.
entry.summary:
Author: wotcherremus

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,665Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Buck: OH MY GOD MADSMADDIEHELP ME Maddie: … Do I need to come get you?Are you okay????? Maddie: Buck? Buck: sorry sorry i just finished freakinf iuteddie kissef nemehe kissed me OR Buck and Eddie keep making out whilst drunk, and it becomes everyone else’s problem.

entry.title: Finding Those Lost
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,090Chapters: 5/24Kudos: 211

Summary: Evangaline ‘Buck’ Buckley has made a home for herself in LA. After the long and difficult path to get here, she doesn’t think there is much left to surprise her. She has a new family, her son is thriving, and she’s loving her work as a firefighter. So what if sometimes the dark still comes for her some nights? When a new firefighter starts at the station, everything Buck thought she knew is thrown up in the air as she tries to keep her past and private life together. Things only get worse when dispatch starts messing the whole station around. -+- A season 2 rewrite that won't make much sense unless you've read part 1.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: in some velvet morning
entry.summary:
Author: heroic_pants

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,635Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 62

Summary: Past the worst of the detoxing, Buck sees Eddie cooking breakfast for him one morning and realises he's in love, and tells him as such. Eddie is determined to have things not change between them. So why is it so weird, suddenly? ******* “But you’re not in love with me, right?” Buck says. Not because he’s not sure. But because he needs Eddie to say it. “Buck, I’m…you know I’m straight,” he replies, which is sort of a roundabout answer. But Buck wishes he’d said a more definitive no. He looks at Eddie’s uncomfortable expression and regrets opening his mouth at all. “I know. I’m sorry I made it weird. I just - I couldn’t bear you not knowing. Because sometimes I think you think you’re not worthy of it, and you needed to know you are.”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: you are mine 'cause I'm lucky
entry.summary:
Author: HeartWizard90

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,056Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 37

Summary: “I feel like a hypocrite,” He sighed. “...Why?” Maddie frowned. Not that he was looking in her direction, but he knew his sister enough to know exactly how she looked right now. “I am so mad at him,” He swallowed -Or; Eddie has put himself in harms way for Buck (again, although far more severe.) Buck copes with the sudden realization that he can't ignore his feelings any longer, and Maddie is always there to be the listening ear.

entry.title: Lightning Never Strikes Twice (Until It Does)
entry.summary:
Author: The_Trinket_Crow

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,891Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 10

Summary: Buck makes a full recovery from the lightning strike and to celebrate, the 118 and co throw him a party. Tensions rise as the Buckley parents show up unannounced and insert themselves into the celebration. As the night goes on, it seems another storm is heading straight for Buck, packing something stronger than lightning.

entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,121Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 105

Summary: Buck is Chris’s friend, he sets his eyes on Eddie and will do anything to make him his, Eddie meanwhile knows buck is FAR too young for him, but the young man’s advances are starting to wear him down… (Teen Buck wants 30 year old Eddie, He WILL get him)

entry.title: Dirty Little Secret
entry.summary:
Author: Thasminsno1fan

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,986Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 40

Summary: Buck and Eddie have been dating for four weeks, completely in secret. Only two people know outside of the couple. Christopher, and Frank, Eddie’s therapist. Eddie had only just figured out he loved Buck, let alone that he was gay. So they sneaked around, finding secrecy fun. But soon enough Buck and Eddie grow tired of hiding what they are, and Eddie tries to figure out if he’s ready to tell everybody. He eventually goes to Hen for Queer Older Sister Advice.

entry.title: The Kiss of Life
entry.summary:
Author: Starryyy55

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,535Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 17

Summary: An rewrite of what goes down in 8x18,"Seismic Shifts"When instead of Ravi and Buck zip lining out of the building, Buck doesn't make it out. Eddie has to find another way to save him before time runs out. Yet Eddie gets trapped as well, and now their both on borrowed time. That panic ignites something in the both of them."Smoke billowed into the sky, distorting the usual coral blue of the California atmosphere. It’s unlike anything he had ever experienced before going into a disaster.His breathing slows and he just stares.A grip on his shoulder, right in the space where his neck and chest meet, brings him back to reality. A spot that Eddie had favored, and constantly used to get Buck’s attention. When Eddie told him he doesn’t trust anyone as much as him with Christopher. That painfully unforgettable split second where Eddie welcomed him back to the land of the living, with that damn knowing smirk. That steadying moment after Buck told Eddie he’s bisexual. Every time he felt that familiar touch, Buck knew he was being brought back from whatever unusual or unsafe place. It was like their version of a pinky promise. The promise being; whenever Buck felt lost, Eddie would know how to find him."

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Cut my trust with sharper knives and only our love now can keep us alive
entry.summary:
Author: rosierrose

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,076Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 34

Summary: This isn't really speculation for 9x17/9x18 because it definitely won't happen, but it's just some fun. In the aftermath of Eddie jumping off yet another bridge, Buck confronts him about his behaviour. Eddie comes clean to him, finally admitting his feelings. They act on said feelings, but a bit of miscommunication (nothing major and nothing that lasts too long, I promise) gets in the way of a happy relationship. BUT THEY'RE IDIOTSSSSSS and they do get sense slapped into them I promise.

entry.title: Buprenorphine and Pink Brandywines
entry.summary:
Author: pyrolysis (bertrandsbakingchannel)

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,288Chapters: 5/10Kudos: 31

Summary: Eddie Diaz doesn’t remember most of his life going by. Buck’s been talking about it lately (when he actually talks to Eddie about things that matters), about how fast they’re getting older. Eddie isn’t sure he’s ready to be satisfied with what he’s done with life. Eddie isn’t sure he’s done everything he wants to yet, but maybe he should try to.   Eddie trying to do things that make him happy, but he sucks at it. Or, how Eddie Diaz mistakes chest pain for happiness.

entry.title: Discovering Buried Love with Drunk Firefighters
entry.summary:
Author: eutony_majime

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,614Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 5

Summary: After an uncertain amount of time that could have been 5 minutes or another 30, Buck finally turned. “What if I made it up to you. We stop for the night in Vegas.” Eddie turned his head just enough to look at Buck. “Vegas?” “Yeah. I’ll pay for a hotel. We can get a couple drinks and make up?” He seemed to think for a moment. “Fine.”

entry.title: "But One Day Things Are Going To Be Very Different"
entry.summary:
Author: AndromedaStars824

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,028Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 7

Summary: Buck doesn't know what a family is like, so the 118 make it their mission to show him in the only ways they know how. By being absolutely batshit crazy in the best way possible. And if Buck learns more about love from a little girl than he has from either of his biological parents, well all the better for it.

entry.title: The Kendall's at the 118
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 174,472Chapters: 36/?Kudos: 99

Summary: After they get rid of Gerrad the 118 is happy to welcome a new captain: Captain Kendall along with his wife Maddie who is a paramedic. However some of the 118 soon notice that things are off with Maddie and Doug's relationship. When Eddie realises that Maddie is his husband's sister it makes things even more complicated and just increases their worry for Maddie.

entry.title: maybe i call you mine (just one time)
entry.summary:
Author: mmmikaela

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,179Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 97

Summary: “I could have gotten a cake from the store, you know,” Hen says, taking a seat next to him on the bench. “If you did that I wouldn’t have been able to show my appreciation,” Buck replies with a grin, making sure to show all of his teeth. She shakes her head. “I would’ve hated to see what the cake would have looked like if he—you know what? Never mind.” “No, no,” Buck says with a curious squint. “If he what?”Or, Buck knows, okay? He knows.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
